info.name: Tasks API
info.description:
Mirrors **`docs/api-spec.json`** (OpenAPI 3.0.3). Same paths as Swagger UI at **`/api/docs`**.

### Setup
1. Set **`baseUrl`** to your API root including `/api` (default: Node **backend-ts** `http://127.0.0.1:3000/api`). For **backend-go**, use `http://127.0.0.1:3001/api` or **`{{baseUrlGo}}`**.
2. Run **Auth → Register** or **Login**; copy **`token`** into collection variable **`bearerToken`**.
3. All **Tasks** requests need **`Authorization: Bearer {{bearerToken}}`**, including **GET** list and **GET** by id — tasks are scoped to the JWT user.
4. **Blockchain** routes are public (no Bearer). Requires SQLite on the server (Node in-memory mode returns **503** for writes).

### Variables
| Variable | Use |
|----------|-----|
| `baseUrl` | Node API base (`.../api`) |
| `baseUrlGo` | Go API base (`.../api`) |
| `bearerToken` | JWT from register/login |
| `taskId` | Path id for task CRUD |
| `page`, `limit` | Task list pagination |
| `chainId`, `walletAddress` | Blockchain history query / body |

item.name: Discovery
item.description: Machine-readable spec (optional). **`servers`** in the live JSON may reflect the request host when using backend-ts or backend-go.

request.description:
**operationId:** `getHealth`

Liveness probe. **200** → `HealthResponse`: `ok`, `service`; with SQLite backends also `storage`, `database`.

item.name: Auth
item.description:
No **Bearer** on these routes. Returns **`AuthResponse`**: `token`, `username`.

**Credential rules (implementations):** username 2–32 chars `[a-z0-9_]`; password 6–128 chars.

request.description:
**operationId:** `register`

Create an account. **201** Created.

**409** — username taken. **400** — validation error.

Copy **`token`** → collection variable **`bearerToken`**.

**operationId:** `login`

**200** OK with JWT. **401** invalid credentials. **400** validation.

Use **`Authorization: Bearer <token>`** on **every** `/tasks` call (including GET).

item.name: Tasks
item.description: **Security:** `bearerAuth` — user JWT (`typ: user`, `sub` = username). Required for **all** methods under `/tasks`, including **GET** list and **GET** by id.

request.description:
**operationId:** `getTask`

Path **`taskId`**: integer ≥ 1.

**200** → `Task`. **404** not found (or not owned). **401**.

**operationId:** `patchTask`

**PatchTaskRequest:** all fields optional — send only what changes.

Examples:
- Toggle done: `{ "completed": true }`
- Rename: `{ "title": "New title" }`
- Clear description: `{ "description": null }`

**200** → `Task`. **404** / **401**.

item.name: Blockchain transfer history
item.description:
Stored in shared SQLite table **`blockchain_transfer_history`**. **Public** — no Bearer.

**GET** requires query **`chainId`** + **`wallet`** (`0x` + 40 hex). **POST** batch append (max 200 items, `INSERT OR IGNORE` per tx hash). **DELETE** clears rows for wallet on chain.

**503** if Node runs without SQLite (in-memory test mode).

request.description:
**operationId:** `appendBlockchainTransferHistory`

**BlockchainTransferHistoryAppendRequest:** `chainId`, `walletAddress`, `items` (1–200). Each item: **`BlockchainTransferHistoryItem`** — required `hash`, `to`, `amountHuman`, `amountRaw`, `symbol`, `asset` (`native`|`erc20`), `status` (`success`|`reverted`|`failed`), `timestamp` (ms); optional `blockNumber`.

**201** → `{ ok, inserted }`. **400** / **503**.
